segments.text: He goes for it, but the last stock player lands the move instead!
segments.original_text: トライしましたが、逆にラス側が技を当てることによって

segments.text: This edgeguard situation is the critical moment—
segments.original_text: 復帰阻止展開、ここが肝になるが

segments.text: He reads it perfectly and applies the full pressure!
segments.original_text: 完全に呼び切って詰めてきったぞ

full_text: He goes for it, but the last stock player lands the move instead! This edgeguard situation is the critical moment— He reads it perfectly and applies the full pressure!
